node.text: BTC Up or Down 5m Predictions & Odds 2026 | Polymarket

node.content-desc: icon for BTC Up or Down 5m

node.text: This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down". The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd. Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
Live data may be delayed by a few seconds and can be influenced by price activity on other exchanges and broader market conditions.

What is the "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" prediction market?
What is the "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" prediction market?

"Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" is a 5-minute prediction market on Polymarket where traders buy and sell shares on whether Bitcoin's price will finish higher ("Up") or lower ("Down") than its opening price over the 5-minute window specified in the title. The current market probability is 51% for "Up." A price of 51% means the market collectively assigns a 51% chance to that outcome. Prices update in real-time as traders react to live Bitcoin price movements. Shares in the correct outcome are redeemable for $1 each upon market resolution.
How much trading activity has "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" generated on Polymarket?
How much trading activity has "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" generated on Polymarket?

"Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" is an active short-term market on Polymarket. Trading volume can accumulate quickly as the 5-minute window progresses — jump in early to help set the odds before this window closes.
How do I trade on "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET"?
How do I trade on "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET"?

To trade on "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET," decide whether you believe Bitcoin's price will finish above or below the opening "Price to Beat" by 3:25AM ET. Buy "Up" if you think the price will rise, or "Down" if you think it will fall. Enter your amount and click "Trade." If your chosen outcome is correct at resolution, each share pays out $1.00. If incorrect, shares are worth $0. Because this market resolves in 5 minutes, the window to exit your position before resolution is short — trade with that in mind.
What are the current odds for "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET"?
What are the current odds for "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET"?

The current probability for "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" is 51% for "Up," meaning the Polymarket crowd currently assigns a 51% chance that Bitcoin's price will finish up over this 5-minute window. These odds update in real-time as traders react to live Bitcoin price data. Because this window resolves in 5 minutes, odds can shift sharply in the final seconds. Check back frequently or trade now before the window closes.
How will "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" be resolved?
How will "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" be resolved?

The "Bitcoin Up or Down - July 3, 3:20AM-3:25AM ET" market resolves based on whether Bitcoin's price at the end of the 5-minute window is greater than or equal to its price at the start of that window — if so, the outcome is "Up"; otherwise it is "Down." The resolution source is the Chainlink BTC/USD data stream. You can review the complete resolution criteria and data source in the "Rules" section on this page. We recommend reading the rules carefully before trading, as they specify the precise conditions, edge cases, and data sources that govern how this market is settled.

is operated by QCX LLC d/b/a Polymarket US, a CFTC-regulated Designated Contract Market. This international platform is not regulated by the CFTC and operates independently. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. See our
